nasb.text: Now it came about at the end of forty years that Absalom said to the king, “Please let me go and pay my vow which I have vowed to the Lord, in Hebron.

esv.text: And at the end of four years Absalom said to the king, “Please let me go and pay my vow, which I have vowed to the Lord, in Hebron.

cnv.text: 過了四年，押沙龍對王說：“求你准我到希伯崙去，好向耶和華還我所許的願。

ccb.text: 过了四年，押沙龙对王说：“请让我到希伯仑去还我向耶和华许下的愿吧。
